description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the erlang:19.1 Docker image. Include a before_script that runs apt-get update -y, installs g++-4.9 with apt-get -y install g++-4.9, and exports CXX=g++-4.9. Add a test job named test in the default test stage that executes epmd -daemon and then runs ./rebar3 ct --sname test. No additional stages, caches, artifacts, or deployment targets are configured.
